variants.title: HiFi Filter SAIN 02EF045004 Clogging Indicator
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAIN 02EF045004 Clogging Indicator. Easy to install and replace, the SAIN 02EF045004 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: CLOGGING INDICATOR, Dimension 1 (D1): 58.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 22.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M10X1, Height 1 (H1): 50.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 17.0 mm
